content:
• Factions Making a Sacrifice (Ex: The Archivists burn records to prevent the war.)
• One-on-One Combat Option (Ex: A single student can fight to prevent the event.)

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Prevents players from feeling powerless against chaos.
✔ Encourages faction-based strategic decision-making.
✔ Adds risk and reward—countering an event requires sacrifice.

📌 FINAL LOCK-IN QUESTIONS BEFORE EXECUTING VERSION 8.5

1. Should There Be an Item Trading Market Where Players Can Trade Their Items?

✔ Should items be tradable, or should each item remain locked to its original player?

2. Should Leadership Exiles Be Permanent, or Can Exiled Players Reclaim Leadership Somehow?

✔ Can a previously exiled leader return, or are they permanently locked out?
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 507 (chunk 507/555)
